title: ProductionSetResponse
description: Schema for ProductionSetResponse in Nuix REST API

frozen.description: Indicates whether or not the production set is frozen.

nextDocumentNumber.description: Document number that will be used for the next item added to this production set.

nextDocumentId.description: Document ID that will be used for the next item added to this production set.

firstDocumentNumber.description: Document number for the first item in this production set.

itemCount.description: Number of items in the production set.
